Set with env var instead of ScriptInfo.load so that it can be accessed early during a factory function.

results.title: Handle app factory errors by distinguishing TypeError from factory-raised errors
results.snippet:
Handle app factory errors by distinguishing TypeError from factory-raised errors
Treat a TypeError as indicating call failure only if it was raised because the call failed, not because something inside the factory raised the error.
